name: Hot Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a skillet until crispy. Remove and drain the bacon.
2. Pour off all but 3 tablespoons of bacon fat from the skillet.
3. Add onion and celery to the skillet and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
4. Blend in flour.
5. Gradually add apple juice and vinegar, stirring until the mixture thickens.
6. Add sugar.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Place potatoes, apples, and crumbled bacon in a greased 1½-quart casserole dish.
9. Add the skillet mixture, mixing lightly.
10. Cover and bake for 30 minutes.
